description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
Win-CodexBar 0.42.0 adds Wayfinder provider support, opt-in local and SSH agent sessions, predictive pace warnings, provider-specific usage thresholds, GPT-5.6 pricing, and Claude model-scoped weekly quotas.
It also reorganizes Settings with a dedicated Providers tab and fixes refresh scheduling, provider parsing, and unnecessary quota refreshes.
